item.title: This was my beloved cousin Will. He lost his battle to bone cancer yesterday. I just wanted people to see his goofy face.
item.description: Thank you everyone. I cannot express what your response means to me in this hard time.

item.title: Napathon [OC]
item.description:
I can sleep pretty much anytime, anywhere! Unless it’s in bed at night… you know, where you’re supposed to be sleeping!
Speaking of sleepy, here is Mr. Chonk diligently paying the cat tax <3 If you like my stuff and want to see more, come support me on Patreon! —> https://www.patreon.com/AmyRevives
item.dc:creator: AmyRevives

item.title: A good way to educate science is to act like a mad scientist.
item.description: Courtesy of Texas A&M's Physics and Astronomy dept. ...if they ever need a voice actor for Edna Mode's sister in The Incredibles 3, they may have found their gal.

item.title: Bad Bitches Memes Dump
item.description:
Probably both?
Purpose unknown...
Probably both?
Hate when I accidentally become the expert on anything
Sharing because ham
Oops
Sharing because tits
Like a dumb bitch
Serving cake
Feelin snackish

item.title: "Have you heard of the extinct species that used to live with the penguins? They were called pencilguins, but they've been erased."

item.title: sci-fi shenanigans & epic geekery (part 460)
item.dc:creator: lydecker17

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1363 (Mongol climate control)
item.description:
Let's get this bread, I guess.
I have no idea if I got the teaching job yet. Got offered a job to sell insurance to companies. I guess it'll have to do. Money is running tight, and frankly, if I eat one more rice-a-roni pasta bowl, I will cry into a pillow. I miss the taste of pizza, Gandalf.
Nowadays, Ghengis Khan and Tamurlane could do the same heroic conservation act by killing only 30 billionaires! Where is our new Great Khan?
I haven't seen a gull in YEARS. I miss them.
I love how when the last emperor of china asked for a phone, he used it to prank call people.
I dreamed of a world where somehow the Chola Empire made contact with the America's, and Mesoamerican Religion got even wilder with a fusion with Hinduism, and you had someone who believed he was an avatar of Huitzilopochtli fighting the Spaniards (with iron weapons) and winning, so you had a modern "Aztec" State. The states of Mesoamerica kept in contact with East Asia with the same sort of monsoon galleon trade the Spanish did with the Philippines.
Added a few more lines to my apocalyptic poem I've been working on.
Woke up with a massive headache today, not a migraine, realized I hadn't had coffee for four days. Guessing that might be the problem.
And if you want to do both, you're pansexual.
I would call my hypothetical partner any of those things she wanted. Call me.
Pertinax buying the Empire from the Praetorian guards.
When this happened at my old job, I would loudly announce "you're wrong, and this is why:," then Crack my knuckles, and then calmly explain why they were wrong, listing sources, and guessing where their misconceptions came from." Usually, it was actually appreciated.
I can't remember why this is here.
Big @xbadxfaeriex and @kaeldra energy.
Pippin tax. Today's message from Pippin: "okay." [Existential conure screaming] ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: What Happened Today #106
item.description: ?️? Threats and intimidation are the Trump administration's playbook. Trump officials target judges, artists, and even their own employees who stand in their way. They use more than words. Senior intelligence officials are fired, the former FBI director is accused of calling for Trump's assassination, and federal agencies purge employees who won't or they think won't comply, including the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs and multiple military officers. Despite these tactics, our institutions are fighting back. Courts continue blocking unlawful deportations and firings, congressional watchdogs are rejecting overreach, and EPA employees unanimously refused to become Soviet-style informants. They can't do it alone. They need your help so check out Mobilize for ways you can participate in taking our country back. Meanwhile, don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email on the homepage of https://www.govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-direct-putin 2. https://go.govbrief.today/dems-blocking-sale 3. https://go.govbrief.today/republicans-block-bill 4. https://go.govbrief.today/moodys-downgrades-us 5. https://go.govbrief.today/measles-30-states 6. https://go.govbrief.today/health-cuts-blocked 7. https://go.govbrief.today/analyst-rethink-intelligence 8. https://go.govbrief.today/plates-dc-streets 9. https://go.govbrief.today/gabbard-comey-hit 10. https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-moving-staff 11. https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-aea-barred 12. https://go.govbrief.today/state-secrets-inadquate 13. https://go.govbrief.today/Trump-admin-new-deportation-error 14. https://go.govbrief.today/trans-workplace-protections 15. https://go.govbrief.today/doge-gao-refuse 16. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-scotus-mass-layoffs 17. https://go.govbrief.today/oregon-humanities-sues 18. https://go.govbrief.today/threats-against-judges 19. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-memecoin-dinner 20. https://go.govbrief.today/springsteen-swift-trump 21. https://go.govbrief.today/epa-employees-dont-snitch
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Well, this sucks.
item.description: These people that say, "Sobriety has given me my life back"....I just can't be in this pointless existence. *Edit* So grateful for the positive comments. I'm crying with emotion trying to make coffee this morning. I'll keep trying, thanks guys, you are all truly wonderful, not a single hateful or negative person. From my heart and soul, thank you all. X
item.dc:creator: ItIsPronnouncedGifNotGif
